Jade Chokidai Prod  
 

Lore Item Quest Item Placeable
Lore Group: Jade Chokidai Prod
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +3 WIS: +6
WT: 4.2 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Jade Chokidai Prod
Lore Item Quest Item Placeable
Lore Group: Jade Chokidai Prod
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +3 WIS: +6
WT: 4.2 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:5 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:971
Lucy Entry By:Kheldar
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:21:04
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 2,675pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 40
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Lake of Ill Omen
NPC Name
Chancellor of Di`Zok
The Fabled Chancellor of Di`Zok

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Swamp of No Hope
Quest Name
Key to Charasis

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Lake of Ill Omen

Send a correction
Post Comment
Stupidly low drop rate
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2018 at 4:57 AM Rating: Decent
ranlren
64 posts
Heard from guildies it was a common drop go and kill chancellor of di zok who spawns like every 45 mins? no drop killed him 4 times and once today, and still no jade chokidai prod
____________________________
your freind ranlren,cleric of 60th level
▲ Page top
Stupidly low drop rate
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2018 at 1:07 PM Rating: Excellent
Gidono
View User Forum
Moderator
6,835 posts
ranlren wrote:
Heard from guildies it was a common drop go and kill chancellor of di zok who spawns like every 45 mins? no drop killed him 4 times and once today, and still no jade chokidai prod


It's not a 100% drop rate so RNG can be cruel sometimes.

"Chancellor of Di`Zok now has a small chance to spawn anywhere in the Sarnak Fort in the Lake of Ill Omen. The throne spawn location for the Chancellor now spawns much more frequently, but is no longer guaranteed to be the Chancellor of Di`Zok."
____________________________
Allakhazam Developer and Admin

For real time update information on Allakhazam, follow me on Twitter!
https://twitter.com/gidono

Or join us via our Discord channel at https://discord.gg/zu9tTS7
▲ Page top
Careful if buying for key quest
QuoteReply
# Nov 03 2003 at 2:48 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591789007542
1 post
Anybody looking to buy this for Howling Stones key quest, please make sure you buy the Shaman only one, the other one will not work in the quest.

I have been camping chancellor on and off for while to get the prod to pass to guildies, cheated yesterday and bought it, didn't even know there were 2 types hehe.

everyone please note that these days the Jade Chokidai Prod is good for everyone doing the Charasis key quest. There is just one version of the Prod.

Jade Chokidai Prod
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2007 at 8:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1706487375740

Scholar
601 posts
Hmm, Yup, I see two on lucy.

Is it just a random drop difference? I've never actually used the Prod, just turn em in for a Charasis key.
▲ Page top
RE: Jade Chokidai Prod
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2007 at 5:10 PM Rating: Decent
Kalysta
Scholar
1,087 posts
There is another version also, not counting the fabled one.
At one time, it was useable by others, and was supposedly overpowering, so the new one is shm only.
Instead of changing them all, they just changed "all from now on".

Pain Mistress Okami L`Assundre of Tarew Marr

Jorfo
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2003 at 1:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1610928999014
12 posts
Wanted to thank Jorfo.=) I just hit my lrvlr and went oto get spells and training and ran right into him! after a moment of Gathering one's senses he looked at my equipment and said..."Here ya go Looks like you can use this..lol" at the time my only weapon was The Veliumn Morning Star and couldn't hit worth ****! and then it's affect wouldn't work till lvl 35.
I was so happy and if he reads this I am in debt to you. At higher levels or if ya need a little errand boy let me know!
He also gave me this Awsome Shield haven't found one better yet!...much indebted to you my friend. and he was one of those awsome guys that said..."To repay me..."(cause i tried to give some plat to him)"..When you get something better..Pass it to another Newbie like i am now..and how another did before me."


Awsome guy never forget him.
▲ Page top
RE: Jorfo
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2003 at 8:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591792002323
6 posts
What server was this on? and what name? I met a gent like that on the Erolisi Marr server. Really nice guy. Think his name was Razzer or something along those lines. I play a shaman on EM server and have been trying to get that spear for months. Always wind up being ajaxed before I get close to killing him.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 24 2002 at 2:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Im on terris thule and in loio if anyone would love to trade this one for the howling harpoon my character is talroknor.
It was a nice prize
QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2002 at 1:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361699639
View User Forum
182 posts
I just won this tonite in a multi guild event. Thanks to Kronack Kindheart of The Elite Force for letting me have this weapon. For me, it is great, and I am not gonna make any STUPID complaints that it is 'nerfed' or that it sux and something else is better. Only problem is, I didn't find a piercing weapon for so long, my skill stinks...but it will get better.

Macavitie, Northman Shaman of 18 seasons
Utopian Eventide Guild
Veeshan server

I was hunting at the Sarnak fort on MT last week. A high level looted this off of the Chancellor. He saw me outside the fort and just gave it to me.

Thanks, friend.

Woot.

question
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 2:06 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
what is the difference between the nerfed and unnerfed version of this weapon?
▲ Page top
RE: question
QuoteReply
# May 16 2001 at 10:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248192675
3 posts
The only difference is the exclusion of Rogue from the list of usable classes in the 'nerfed' spear.
▲ Page top
2 versions
QuoteReply
# May 02 2001 at 2:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756301871
9 posts
It should be noted that there are 2 versions of this spear. The one listed here is the nerfed version. The Jade Chokidai Prod used to be wieldable by Rogues (and other classes I think). The spear is used for a quest for a key to Sebilis (if I am not mistaken) and I believe also for a rogue quest.

I have seen the un-nerfed version listed at 10kpp, just due to it's rarity.
▲ Page top
RE: 2 versions
QuoteReply
# May 20 2001 at 7:00 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593965827286
Scholar
21 posts
Spear is used for the key to Charasis (Howling Stones), not Sebilis. :)

range
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2001 at 5:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247768894
6 posts
if ya want a ranged spear...dont waste plat on anything other than howling harpoon! very sweet!
adds 6wis and 40 mana!
▲ Page top
trade
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2001 at 1:46 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I just traded my slime coated harpoon for this spear. The stats on the slime coated were dmg 10 delay 25 Wis +5 mana +10 - i thoguht this was better but i guess not, it says the slime coated is worth like 1 k more almost. why is this so? did i get ripped?
▲ Page top
RE: trade - you got ripped
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2001 at 4:17 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The slime has lowere delay, better dam/delay ratio, and can go in range slot. you got ripped. For anyone buying this for the HS key quest 1k is nothing, plus they would have no problem getting it themselfs.
▲ Page top
RE: trade
QuoteReply
# Apr 25 2001 at 1:13 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The Slime Coated Spear is worth more because it can be equipped in the range slot, which is nice for Shaman wanting to get 200 Wis
▲ Page top
RE: trade
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2001 at 3:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246550281
View User Forum
Scholar
82 posts
probably not. It's probably worth more because it's part of a quest to get the keys to Howling Stones, a high 50+? level dungeon.
